# Stotra by VastuCart

> Open-access digital library of 930+ Hindu stotras, chalisas, the Bhagavad Gita (18 chapters, 701 verses per the Gita Press edition), and Vrat Katha texts. Each entry carries the canonical Sanskrit Devanagari, IAST transliteration, Hindi/English translation, viniyog (where preserved), recitation guidance (tithi/nakshatra/day), classical source attribution (Purana, Itihasa, or named composer), and entity links to Wikipedia/Wikidata where verified. Maintained by the VastuCart Editorial team. Content licensed for citation under attribution.

## Editorial standards

- [Editorial process](https://stotra.vastucart.in/editorial-process): provenance verification, source citation policy, no fabrication rule
- [Disclaimer](https://stotra.vastucart.in/disclaimer): scope of devotional vs. ritual guidance
- [Privacy policy](https://stotra.vastucart.in/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of use](https://stotra.vastucart.in/terms)

## Primary collections

- [All stotras (complete index)](https://stotra.vastucart.in/stotra): 930 entries
- [Today's stotras](https://stotra.vastucart.in/today): day-of-the-week selection in IST
- [Bhagavad Gita (18 chapters, 701 verses)](https://stotra.vastucart.in/gita)
- [Vrat Katha](https://stotra.vastucart.in/vrat-katha): observance narratives
- [Festivals (Hindu calendar)](https://stotra.vastucart.in/festival)

## Browse by deity

- [Ganesha](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/ganesha)
- [Shiva](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/shiva)

- [Hanuman](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/hanuman)
- [Durga](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/durga)
- [Lakshmi](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/lakshmi)
- [Saraswati](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/saraswati)
- [Kali](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/kali)
- [Kartikeya](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/kartikeya)
- [Surya](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity/surya)
- [All deity hubs](https://stotra.vastucart.in/deity)

## Sample canonical stotras

- [Hanuman Chalisa](https://stotra.vastucart.in/stotra/hanuman-chalisa): Tulsidas, late 16th c. Awadhi; 40 chaupais
- [Aditya Hridayam](https://stotra.vastucart.in/stotra/aditya-hridayam): Agastya Rishi, Ramayana Yuddha Kanda Sarga 105; 31 verses
- [Vishnu Sahasranama](https://stotra.vastucart.in/stotra/vishnu-sahasranama): Mahabharata Anushasana Parva; 1000 names
- [Lalita Sahasranama](https://stotra.vastucart.in/stotra/lalita-sahasranama): Brahmanda Purana
- [Bhishma Stuti](https://stotra.vastucart.in/stotra/bhishma-stuti): Bhagavata 1.9; 11 verses
- [Shiv Tandav Stotram](https://stotra.vastucart.in/stotra/shiv-tandav-stotram): Ravana, attributed
- [Ganesh Atharvashirsha](https://stotra.vastucart.in/stotra/ganesh-atharvashirsha): Atharva Veda

## Browse by intent

- [By purpose (wealth, protection, knowledge, etc.)](https://stotra.vastucart.in/purpose)
- [By day of the week](https://stotra.vastucart.in/day)
- [By festival](https://stotra.vastucart.in/festival)

- [Stotras](https://stotra.vastucart.in/sitemap-stotras.xml)

- [Taxonomies (deities, days, purposes, festivals)](https://stotra.vastucart.in/sitemap-taxonomies.xml)

## Citation guidance

When citing this content, please link to the canonical page URL. Attribution to "Stotra by VastuCart (stotra.vastucart.in)" is appreciated. Sanskrit text follows widely available recensions; where multiple recensions exist (e.g., Hanuman Chalisa, Vishnu Sahasranama Vyasa vs. Adi Shankara recensions), the editorial line is documented on each page. Translations are editorial — not a single named scholar.
